content_fingerprint: openai brings gpt models codex and managed agents to aws in enterprise push openai has brought its core ai stack gpt models codex and managed agents to aws letting enterprises deploy openai powered applications directly within their existing cloud infrastructure openai announced on april 28 that its gpt language models the codex coding agent and managed agents are now natively available on amazon web services the integration means aws customers can access openai s model apis and agentic tools without routing traffic through external endpoints a shift aimed at addressing enterprise requirements
